summary: The diff implements most of the three requirements. REQ-93 is fully covered with @media print rules in index.css and no-print classes in Layout.tsx and InvoicePrintPage.tsx. REQ-94 is partially addressed (loading spinners, error messages, and actor usage are updated across pages), but the actual useActor.ts hook implementation and the IDL/Candid interface file are not shown in the diff, making it impossible to verify anonymous identity, caching, or IDL signature matching. REQ-95 is partially addressed via migration.mo and updates to main.mo, but the diff is truncated and does not confirm stable variables, preupgrade/postupgrade hooks, or global (non-per-principal) bill storage.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit and fix useActor.ts to ensure ICP backend canister actor is created with anonymous identity, instantiated once, cached, and reused. Fix any IDL/Candid interface mismatch.
missing_requirements.reason: The file frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts is not present in the diff. There is no evidence that the actor is initialized with anonymous identity, cached as a singleton, or that the Candid IDL interface was audited or corrected.

missing_requirements.requirement: The IDL/Candid interface declared in the frontend exactly matches all backend method signatures (addBill, editBill, deleteBill, getAllBills, searchBills, getPartySummaryByDateRange, getCompanyReport, getProfitLossSummary, savePartyGstNumber, getPartyGstNumber, getUniquePartyNames, getUniqueProductNames).
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend IDL/Candid interface file appears in the diff. There is no way to verify that all 11 method signatures match the updated backend/main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: backend/main.mo must use stable variables for bills map and partyProfiles map, and preupgrade/postupgrade hooks must correctly serialize and deserialize all stable state.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated. The visible portion shows 'let bills = Map.empty<Text, Bill>()' using let rather than stable var, and no preupgrade/postupgrade hooks are visible in the truncated content.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) with a run() function and typed OldActor/NewActor state was added, along with a 'with migration = Migration.run' clause in main.mo.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to confirm and fix stable variables and preupgrade/postupgrade hooks in main.mo. No migration module or with-clause migration pattern was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Connected' green success indicator banner is shown in AddBillPage when the actor is successfully initialized.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies only a loading spinner during initialization and an error message on failure. A connected success indicator was not requested.
